applied_terms: “shmoo plot”再次出现，保持译法一致。
“worse power efficiency”译为“能效更差”或“功耗表现不佳”。
“maintain reliability”译为“维持可靠性”，是电路设计的关键考量。
对比数据（10.9 Gb/s @ 0.95V vs 12.8 Gb/s @ 0.97V）的翻译需清晰无误。

understanding.role_in_article: 将SK海力士的LPDDR6与三星进行对比分析，聚焦于能效差异，并介绍其类似的效率模式。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从三星LPDDR6及其PHY转向其直接竞争对手SK海力士的同类产品，形成对比章节。
understanding.relation_to_next: 继续讨论SK海力士的另一产品线（GDDR7），保持按公司分类的叙述结构。
key_points: SK海力士LPDDR6在最高速（14.4 Gb/s）上与三星持平，但在中低电压/速度下能效可能较差（需更高电压维持可靠性）。
同样具备正常模式和效率模式，效率模式在单子通道下运行，可降低待机和操作电流。

paragraphs.source: SK Hynix unveiled their first 1c DRAM products, both in LPDDR6 and in GDDR7 packages. Their LPDDR6 can operate at a data rate of up to 14.4 Gb/s, 35% faster than the fastest LPDDR5X, and at lower power.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: SK Hynix unveiled their first 1c DRAM products, both in LPDDR6 and in GDDR7 packages. Their LPDDR6 can operate at a data rate of up to 14.4 Gb/s, 35% faster than the fastest LPDDR5X, and at lower power.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: SK Hynix unveiled their first 1c DRAM products, both in LPDDR6 and in GDDR7 packages. Their LPDDR6 can operate at a data rate of up to 14.4 Gb/s, 35% faster than the fastest LPDDR5X, and at lower power.

pro.text: SK海力士首次展示了其采用1c工艺的DRAM产品，包括LPDDR6和GDDR7两种封装。其LPDDR6的最高数据速率可达14.4 Gb/s，比最快的LPDDR5X提升了35%，且功耗更低。

paragraphs.source: Although SK Hynix did not state the area or density of the LPDDR6 chip, we estimate the bit density will reach 0.59 Gb/mm², based on the relative density increase of their GDDR7.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Although SK Hynix did not state the area or density of the LPDDR6 chip, we estimate the bit density will reach 0.59 Gb/mm², based on the relative density increase of their GDDR7.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Although SK Hynix did not state the area or density of the LPDDR6 chip, we estimate the bit density will reach 0.59 Gb/mm², based on the relative density increase of their GDDR7.

pro.text: 尽管SK海力士未公布LPDDR6芯片的面积或密度，但根据其GDDR7产品的相对密度提升幅度，我们估计其位密度将达到0.59 Gb/mm²。

paragraphs.source: In their shmoo plot, SK Hynix showed that they can reach a data rate of 14.4 Gb/s at 1.025V, the same as Samsung. However, they can only reach 10.9 Gb/s at 0.95V as compared to Samsung’s 12.8 Gb/s at 0.97V. This indicates that SK Hynix may have worse power efficiency at lower pin speeds when compared to Samsung, having to run at higher voltages to maintain reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In their shmoo plot, SK Hynix showed that they can reach a data rate of 14.4 Gb/s at 1.025V, the same as Samsung. However, they can only reach 10.9 Gb/s at 0.95V as compared to Samsung’s 12.8 Gb/s at 0.97V. This indicates that SK Hynix may have worse power efficiency at lower pin speeds when compared to Samsung, having to run at higher voltages to maintain reliability.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In their shmoo plot, SK Hynix showed that they can reach a data rate of 14.4 Gb/s at 1.025V, the same as Samsung. However, they can only reach 10.9 Gb/s at 0.95V as compared to Samsung’s 12.8 Gb/s at 0.97V. This indicates that SK Hynix may have worse power efficiency at lower pin speeds when compared to Samsung, having to run at higher voltages to maintain reliability.

pro.text: 在其展示的舒姆图中，SK海力士表明其产品可在1.025V电压下达到14.4 Gb/s的数据速率，这与三星相同。然而，在0.95V电压下，其速率仅能达到10.9 Gb/s，而三星产品在0.97V下可达12.8 Gb/s。这表明，在较低的引脚速率下，与三星相比，SK海力士的能效可能较差，需要运行在更高电压以维持可靠性。

understanding.role_in_article: 将SK海力士的LPDDR6与三星进行对比分析，聚焦于能效差异，并介绍其类似的效率模式。
understanding.relation_to_previous: 从三星LPDDR6及其PHY转向其直接竞争对手SK海力士的同类产品，形成对比章节。
understanding.relation_to_next: 继续讨论SK海力士的另一产品线（GDDR7），保持按公司分类的叙述结构。
key_points: SK海力士LPDDR6在最高速（14.4 Gb/s）上与三星持平，但在中低电压/速度下能效可能较差（需更高电压维持可靠性）。
同样具备正常模式和效率模式，效率模式在单子通道下运行，可降低待机和操作电流。
translation_notes: “shmoo plot”再次出现，保持译法一致。

“maintain reliability”译为“维持可靠性”，是电路设计的关键考量。
对比数据（10.9 Gb/s @ 0.95V vs 12.8 Gb/s @ 0.97V）的翻译需清晰无误。

issues.description: 术语翻译不一致，且“芯片显微照片”不够专业。
“涵盖...两种封装形式”略显书面化，可以更简洁。
译文“在较低的引脚速度下”可能引起歧义，原文“at lower pin speeds”更可能指“在较低的引脚速率（即数据速率）下”。
句子结构可以调整得更紧凑，使因果关系更清晰。

paragraphs.source: Like Samsung’s LPDDR6, SK Hynix’s LPDDR6 also features two modes, a normal mode and an efficiency mode. The efficiency mode runs at 12.8 Gb/s over a single sub-channel, with 12.7% and 18.9% lower standby and operational current draw respectively compared to normal mode.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Like Samsung’s LPDDR6, SK Hynix’s LPDDR6 also features two modes, a normal mode and an efficiency mode. The efficiency mode runs at 12.8 Gb/s over a single sub-channel, with 12.7% and 18.9% lower standby and operational current draw respectively compared to normal mode.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Like Samsung’s LPDDR6, SK Hynix’s LPDDR6 also features two modes, a normal mode and an efficiency mode. The efficiency mode runs at 12.8 Gb/s over a single sub-channel, with 12.7% and 18.9% lower standby and operational current draw respectively compared to normal mode.

pro.text: 与三星的LPDDR6类似，SK海力士的LPDDR6也具备两种模式：普通模式和能效模式。在能效模式下，单个子通道以12.8 Gb/s的速率运行，其待机电流和工作电流相比普通模式分别降低了12.7%和18.9%。
